body.u: I can remember my fartherfather making me stay in for nights on end in order to make me revise for my exams. I Gessguess I was a bit lazy then if it wasn’t for him I would have never got through my O’levels and C.S.E.s When I finally got the qualification I wanted for art collage, I applied and got in. I then did a yearsyear's grounding course. I then specialised in Graphics and went into the film industry.

For alonga long time I have had ideas of going into the film industry and it was hard. For alonga long time I couldn’t get a job. So, disappointed and almost broke I borrowed some money from my parents and went to America.
Here I found plenty of work. I especially enjoyed doing the science fiction films. By thirty I was top of my field.
It was then that I meet my future wife. We got married three months later in England.
At forty I joined my farthersfather's business and with moderate success I retired to a villa in Cyprus.
